emptyChannels: No channels. Create one to get started.
emptyGroups: No groups. Create one, then drag channels or models into it.
deleteChannelDesc: This action cannot be undone. The channel and its configuration will be permanently removed.
deleteGroupDesc: This action cannot be undone. The group and all its routing rules will be permanently removed.
clearGroupDesc: All channels and models will be removed from this group. The group itself will remain.

toast.modelAlreadyInGroup: This model is already in this group
toast.channelNoModels: This channel has no models configured
toast.allModelsAlreadyInGroup: All models from this channel are already in this group

channelDialog.name: Name
channelDialog.modelInputPlaceholder: Type model name, press Enter to add
channelDialog.fetchFillFirst: Please fill in Base URL and credentials first
channelDialog.fetchNoModels: No models found from this provider
channelDialog.fetchFallback: API unreachable, loaded {{count}} models from models.dev
channelDialog.cursorCredentialsHint: Paste {"accessToken","machineId","macMachineId"}, a raw token, or a full cursoride2api token.json with a "tokens" array. Base URL defaults to https://api2.cursor.sh when empty.
channelDialog.cursorCredentialImported: Imported. Click Save below to apply.
channelDialog.cursorCredentialImportInvalidJson: Invalid JSON. Expected a credential object {…} or a string.

groupDialog.name: Name
groupDialog.emptyItems: No models added yet. Click Add or drag from the left panel.

profile.title: Model Profiles
profile.previewEmpty: No official models found for this profile.
profile.previewReadonly: Built-in profile uses official model preview mode.

toast.groupNotFound: Materialized group no longer exists, please refresh

price.description: Manage model pricing for cost calculation

deleteDialog.title: Delete price for “{{name}}”?
deleteDialog.description: This will remove the pricing data for this model. Historical cost calculations that used this price will not be affected.

cursor.refreshHint: Pull the latest model list from Cursor (GetUsableModels) and save it on this channel.
cursor.refreshUnchanged: No model list available (check that a channel key is set and enabled). The channel was not changed.

codex.noAuthFiles: No auth files found. Click "Import via OAuth" to add accounts, then "Sync Keys" to import.
codex.keyManagedByAuthFiles: Keys are managed from imported auth files. Use "Sync Keys" in channel detail to import them as keys.
codex.oauthHint: Click the link below to open the OAuth login page. After completing login, this dialog will automatically detect the result.
codex.saveChannelFirst: Please save the channel first, then use "Import via OAuth" to add accounts.
codex.oauthWaiting: Waiting for OAuth login to complete...
codex.oauthSuccess: OAuth login successful! Auth file has been imported.
codex.oauthDeviceCode: Enter this code on the page that opens:
codex.oauthTimeout: OAuth login timed out. Please try again.
codex.oauthCallbackHint: If the server is deployed remotely and the callback redirects to localhost, paste the full callback URL here to complete the flow manually.
codex.oauthCallbackSubmitted: Callback submitted successfully. Waiting for auth file import...

runtime.noAuthFiles: No auth files found yet. Import {{provider}} accounts with OAuth or upload auth files to continue.
runtime.keyManagedByAuthFiles: {{provider}} credentials are managed through imported auth files, not a pasted API key.
runtime.modelHint: Models for {{provider}} runtime channels are synced from imported accounts. New runtime models such as gpt-5.4 appear here after sync, and you can still review or supplement the final model list.
runtime.saveChannelFirst: Please save the {{provider}} channel first, then import runtime accounts.
runtime.oauthHint: Start the {{provider}} OAuth flow in a new page. This dialog keeps polling and imports the auth file automatically after login succeeds.
runtime.invalidJsonFile: Please choose a valid {{provider}} auth .json file.
runtime.searchAuthFiles: Search auth files by name or email
runtime.allMatchingSelected_one: All matching results selected except exclusions ({{count}} auth file)
runtime.allMatchingSelected_other: All matching results selected except exclusions ({{count}} auth files)

dialog.deviceCodeDescription: Open the verification page, paste this code, and finish sign-in in your browser.
dialog.redirectDescription: Open the OAuth page, finish sign-in, then paste the callback URL here.
dialog.redirectHelp: If the browser does not complete the flow, retry the login attempt and start from a fresh link.
dialog.callbackDescription: Copy the full localhost callback address from the browser and import it here.

oauth.resumableHint: A previous {{provider}} OAuth session is still active. Reopen the browser flow or finish importing the callback URL to continue.
oauth.restartHint: Restart the OAuth flow from a fresh link if you want to try again.
oauth.startFailed: Failed to start the OAuth flow.

phase.awaiting_browser: Open the {{provider}} sign-in page in your browser and finish the verification steps there.
phase.importing_auth_file: OAuth finished. Waiting for the runtime worker to import the auth file.

warnings.poll_retrying: Connection looks unstable. The dialog will keep retrying OAuth status checks.
warnings.import_stalled: OAuth finished, but auth file import is taking longer than expected.
warnings.clipboard_read_failed: Clipboard access failed. Paste the callback URL manually instead.
warnings.popup_blocked: The auth page could not open automatically. Use the copied link or allow popups and try again.

terminal.completed: OAuth login completed and the auth file refresh has started.

terminalCodes.access_denied: Login was canceled or permission was denied.
terminalCodes.auth_import_failed: OAuth succeeded, but importing the auth file failed.
terminalCodes.invalid_callback_url: The pasted callback URL is invalid.
terminalCodes.missing_code: The callback URL is missing the required code parameter.
terminalCodes.missing_state: The callback URL is missing the required state parameter.
terminalCodes.provider_error: The upstream provider returned an OAuth error.
terminalCodes.provider_mismatch: This callback belongs to a different provider.
terminalCodes.runtime_callback_rejected: The runtime worker rejected the callback URL.
terminalCodes.session_missing: This OAuth session is no longer available.
terminalCodes.session_superseded: A newer OAuth session replaced this one.
terminalCodes.state_mismatch: This callback belongs to a different login attempt.

providerDescription.codex: Create a runtime-managed Codex channel that pulls credentials from imported auth files or OAuth instead of a pasted API key.
providerDescription.copilot: Create a runtime-managed GitHub Copilot channel that uses imported runtime credentials and quota-aware auth-file management.
providerDescription.codex-cli: Create a runtime-managed Codex CLI channel that proxies to chatgpt.com Responses API using OpenAI OAuth credentials from imported auth files.
providerDescription.antigravity: Create a runtime-managed Antigravity channel that proxies to Google Cloud Code internal API with full Anthropic-to-Gemini protocol conversion.

routingRules.title: Routing Rules
routingRules.description: Define conditional rules to route, reject, or rewrite requests before they reach upstream providers.

form.name: Rule Name
form.namePlaceholder: e.g. Block GPT-4 for free keys
